subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord of the world and He Who is manifest through the Most Great Name! How can I make mention of Thee when I have become certain that the one who maketh mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مالک العالم و الظاهر بالاسم الاعظم کیف اذکرک بعد ایقانی بان الذاکر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
